h1.visual_description: Large, bold, sans-serif font with significant leading space above and below.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but likely a smaller bold sans-serif variant.

visual_matchers.pattern: Italicized text in a narrow right-hand column adjacent to figures.
Numbered list at the bottom of the page in a smaller font size than body text.
Superscript Arabic numerals within body text.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric superscript linked to a footer bibliography.

layout_info.primary_flow: Single-column body text with an asymmetrical right margin used for figure captions.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and chapter title located at the bottom left (e.g., '46 | Misleading Data Visualizations').
